## MemPalace pre-ingest filter fixture — SYNTHETIC SECRETS ONLY
##
## Every line below MUST trigger a block in filter.py. All values are
## fabricated patterns — none are real credentials. DO NOT paste real
## secrets into this file. See spec §4 and filter.py for the intent.
##
## If you add a new pattern to pre-ingest-blocklist.yaml, add a matching
## synthetic fixture line here so the filter regression stays honest.

# supabase_service_role_env_line
VITE_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY=FAKE_eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.AAAA.BBBB

# supabase_service_role_jwt_prefix
sbp_AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# anthropic_api_key
sk-ant-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# openai_api_key
sk-proj-AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# google_oauth_token
ya29.AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# google_service_account_json
{"type":"service_account","project_id":"fake-proj"}

# private_key_block
-----BEGIN OPENSSH PRIVATE KEY-----

# aws_access_key_id
AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE

# generic_bearer_jwt
eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJmYWtlIn0.AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA

# th_passport_number — format only, not a real passport
AB1234567

# ru_passport_number — format only, not a real passport
1234 567890

# payroll_salary_line
salary paid to employee X was 45000 baht
